violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Pico de gallo was observed held at 59 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC added ice. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Various items were observed past 7 day date marking. Items disposed of. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The door to the outside, located at the side entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The hand-washing sinks in the bathrooms and dishwashing area were lacking proper handwashing signs. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC placed soap at sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC placed paper towels at sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Hand-sink in the bar area was observed as a dump sink. PIC removed strainer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the DATE when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine, food chopper blade, mandoline) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC started to clean/sanitize ice machine during inspection, ice was discarded, and other items were washed/sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 10 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC took unit out of service and called someone for service. Establishment will use 3 bay sink at bar or dishwasher in kitchen area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC has service request in prior to inspection. Establishment will use dishwasher unit in kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Pico de gallo was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed item in ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Inspector observed various items past the 7 day date marking. PIC discarded items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Inspector observed in-use utensils being stored in a container of chemical. PIC informed and staff removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The door to the outside, located in the side receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The doors to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The floors in the bar area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The floor in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair (needs resealing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2026
The bar wall in the bar area is in poor repair (warping with exposed wood). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

Blanched potatoes and chicken tenders were observed stored in stacked containers with plastic wrap. Containers of food were vented and unstacked to allow proper air flow for cooling. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged cooked lobster was observed thawing in a refrigeration unit with the packaging still intact. Reduced oxygen seafood must be opened prior to thawing. Packages of food were opened during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
Pipes under food preparation sink were observed leaking. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The doors to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
